import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { MapPin, Phone, Mail, Send, Clock } from 'lucide-react'; import { toast } from 'react-toastify'; import '../assets/styles/Contact.css'; const Contact = () => { const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', phone: '', subject: '', message: '' }); const [sending, setSending] = useState(false); const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (!form.name || !form.email || !form.message) { toast.error('Please fill in all required fields.'); return; } setSending(true); // Simulate sending setTimeout(() => { toast.success('Message sent! We\'ll get back to you within 24 hours. 🙏'); setForm({ name: '', email: '', phone: '', subject: '', message: '' }); setSending(false); }, 1500); }; return (
